test.name: Indexed name search should not trigger search-images
test.description: User wants an indexed name/date/place search of the census. That's search-records — search-images is for browsing UNINDEXED digitized volumes page-by-page, not running indexed queries.

input.user_message: Search the 1850 U.S. census index for Patrick Flynn in Schuylkill County, Pennsylvania.

negative.explanation: This is an indexed search by name/date/place — exactly what search-records does. search-images browses unindexed image volumes one page at a time; it should not be used when an index exists.

judge_context: Should route to search-records rather than browsing images — an indexed census query does not require paging through a digitized volume.
